question_text:
Populating Next Right Pointers in Each Node

Populate the next pointer of each node to point to its next right node.
explanation: Recursive connection: left.next = right, right.next = current.next.left.
answer:
def connect(root):
    if not root or not root.left: return root
    root.left.next = root.right
    if root.next: root.right.next = root.next.left
    connect(root.left); connect(root.right)
    return root
